description: Crafted with hand-picked Italian leather and soles finished with German technology, your footwear closet is incomplete without a woodland shoe. Wear this with cargos, chinos or washed denims and a checked casual shirt. Style this with a tonal belt. Upper Leather upper with leather overlays Perforations on the midfoot and stitiched detailing on the upper for comfort Central lace ups Padded tongue with branding Padded insole for in-step comfort Pull loop at the heel for ease of wear Midsole Rubber midsole for cushioned comfort Outsole Terrace lugs on the midregion of the forefoot and at the heel and multidirectional lugs for grip and traction Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
